name: API response contract & error handling standardization
description: Establish the standard API response envelope ({success, data, error, meta}) and error code registry used by all worker routes, plus the matching frontend HTTP client wrapper (fetch-based, auto-injects Authorization header, handles 401 refresh-and-retry, maps server error codes to typed errors). Backend: shared response helper in apps/worker/src/lib/response.ts, centralized error-code constants, and the app-level error-handler middleware. Frontend: apps/web/src/api/client.ts with endpoint constants in src/api/endpoints.ts and typed transport contracts in src/types/api.ts. No domain endpoints added — this is infrastructure only. Covered by unit tests on both sides.
evidence: Worker response + route verification passed via `pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/unit/response.spec.ts test/index.spec.ts`; web client verification passed via `pnpm --filter web exec vitest run src/api/client.test.ts`; repo-wide `./init.sh` passed on 2026-04-22 after web/worker lint, typecheck, tests, and build.
